description: A supplier needs to schedule a delivery appointment for a large shipment arriving next week.

nodes.task_description: Access the warehouse's receiving dock calendar.

expected_outcome.value: Agent opens the scheduling tool for the receiving department.

nodes.task_description: Find an available time slot for the specified date and shipment size.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies an open 2-hour slot on the requested day.

nodes.task_description: Book the appointment and send a confirmation to the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the appointment and a confirmation email is sent.
